libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: When generating or updating the test build for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1, ensure native test runtime args include -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. The existing 5.0.0 test build already applies these only for 5.0.0 because Vert.x 5 pulls Netty 4.2.x; the resolved 5.0.1 artifact also depends on Netty 4.2.2.Final. Meaningful tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer with WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient, forms, multipart uploads, redirects, cookies, and JSON bodies; no external Docker service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Do not add optional dependencies such as vertx-auth-oauth2 or jackson-databind unless tests intentionally exercise OAuth2 integration or POJO databind codecs.
Local Gradle and Native Image runs remain authoritative for whether the Netty system properties are sufficient on the selected JDK/native-image mode.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but 5.0.1 still pulls Netty 4.2.x and should carry the same Java 25 native runtime system properties already used for 5.0.0.
